hero.badge: AI Essay Grading Built for Hong Kong Teachers
hero.headline: Reclaim Time for Hong Kong Teachers: DSE-Level AI Essay Grading Expert
hero.subheadline: Compify batch-grades your entire class against DSE/TSA rubrics, generating Content, Language & Organization scores with professional PDF reports — subscribe today, finish 30 essays tonight.

dimensions.label: Professional Dimension View
dimensions.title: Break every essay down by the three DSE standards
dimensions.subtitle: Compify separates overall performance into Content, Language, and Organization so teachers can see exactly where each student needs support.
dimensions.contentDesc: Evaluates ideas, development, evidence relevance, and how completely the essay answers the prompt.
dimensions.languageDesc: Analyzes vocabulary accuracy, sentence variety, grammar control, and natural expression.
dimensions.organizationDesc: Reviews paragraph structure, cohesion, argument sequence, and the overall flow of writing.
dimensions.chartNote: The radar view helps teachers identify class-wide and individual ability profiles in seconds for targeted follow-up teaching.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Grading Shouldn't Consume Your Life
problem.subtitle: Hong Kong teachers and tutors are drowning in essay marking with few good options.
problem.item1Desc: Outsourced marking costs HK$100–150 per essay with 3–5 day turnaround. A class of 30 essays costs over HK$3,000.
problem.item2Desc: ChatGPT and Grammarly don't follow HKEAA rubrics. Their feedback can't be used for official school reports.
problem.item3Title: B2B Solutions Are Out of Reach
problem.item3Desc: Enterprise grading platforms cost HK$30k+/year with complex contracts. Individual teachers and tutors can't access them.

solution.label: How It Works
solution.title: Three Steps to Reclaim Your
solution.subtitle: From upload to report in under 5 minutes. No installation, no training, instant access.
solution.step1Desc: Drag and drop a batch of essays — PDFs, DOCX, or plain text. Upload 30 at once, auto-match to your class roster.
solution.step2Desc: Our AI scores each essay on Content, Language, and Organization aligned with DSE/TSA rubrics, with detailed justifications.
solution.step3Desc: Download polished PDF student reports ready to share with parents. Export CSV for class-wide error analysis.

features.label: Features
features.title: Purpose-Built for Hong Kong Teachers
features.subtitle: Not a generic AI tool. Every feature is designed for the Hong Kong classroom.
features.batchUploadDesc: Upload up to 100 essays at once, auto-matched to your class roster. Grade a whole class, not one by one.
features.aiGradingDesc: Built-in DSE English Paper 2, Chinese composition and more. Provides C/L/O sub-scores for report cards.
features.exportDesc: PDF reports designed like official school feedback forms — ready to send to students and parents.
features.privacyDesc: Student data encrypted. Supports ID numbers instead of names. Compliant with HK PDPO.
features.analyticsDesc: Auto-detect common errors like '30% of students confuse Present Perfect vs Past Simple' — your next lesson plan, done.
features.multiTeacherDesc: School plans let your department share student data and standardize grading criteria.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Trusted by Hong Kong Teachers
testimonials.t1Quote: Marking 4A's 30 Paper 2 essays used to take my entire weekend. With Compify, I'm done in 2 hours. I finally have time for lesson planning and family.
testimonials.t2Quote: I handle over 100 student essays per month. Outsourcing was way too expensive. Compify's PDF reports are professional enough to WhatsApp directly to parents.
testimonials.t3Role: English Panel Head, DSS Secondary School
testimonials.t3Quote: Our panel of 8 teachers all use the School plan. Grading standards are now consistent across the department, and report card prep is so much faster. Way cheaper than B2B alternatives.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Beta early-bird pricing for the first 100 Pro users, with pay-as-you-go credits for occasional grading.
pricing.proDesc: Beta early-bird price, limited to the first 100 users
pricing.proF6: Personal use only to prevent account sharing
pricing.earlyBirdTitle: Beta testing period: Pro is now HK$168 for a limited time (regular HK$288)
pricing.earlyBirdDesc: Only for the first 100 users. Join now to lock in the early-bird offer while the public price remains positioned at HK$288.
pricing.creditDesc: For teachers who only need occasional marking: buy 10 professional reports first, then upgrade when usage grows.
pricing.termsNote: Pro is for personal use only. If simultaneous multi-user or multi-IP usage is detected, an upgrade to School / Enterprise may be required.

cta.title: Subscribe Today, Grade Tonight
cta.subtitle: No six-month trials. No complex contracts. Start now and finish your whole class in 5 minutes.
cta.note: No credit card required. 5 free essays included.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back! Your grading workspace is ready.
dashboard.creditsActivated: 10 report credits have been added to your account.
dashboard.creditsFailed: Could not add report credits. Please contact support.
dashboard.reportCreditsDesc: Used automatically after free quota runs out.

grade.title: Grade an Essay
grade.subtitle: Paste text, or drag & drop files to receive AI-powered feedback.
grade.contentPlaceholder: Paste the essay text here, or use drag & drop above...
grade.extractError: Could not extract text from the uploaded file(s).
grade.pasteError: Please paste or upload essay content.
grade.limitReachedDesc: Upgrade to Pro for unlimited essay grading.
grade.editHint: Edit the Markdown feedback above. Changes will be saved and reflected in exports.
grade.rubricHint: Define your own grading criteria and weights. The AI will score each criterion separately and compute a weighted total.
grade.studentLevelPlaceholder: Select student level for tiered feedback
grade.studentLevelHint: AI adjusts feedback depth and tone based on student ability.
grade.examinerModeHint: When enabled, AI comments cite DSE Marking Scheme keywords and follow Hong Kong education writing conventions.
grade.savedConfigsHint: Save your current grading setup so you can reuse it next time without reconfiguring.
grade.selectSavedConfig: Choose a saved setup to apply
grade.noSavedConfigs: No saved setups yet. Configure your settings below and click "Save current setup".
grade.configNamePlaceholder: Name this setup (e.g. DSE Chinese · S5)
grade.configNameRequired: Please enter a name for this setup.
grade.upgradeFailed: Could not generate upgrade advice. Please try again.
grade.abilitySubtitle: The system converts the grading summary into a DSE-aligned ability profile across the three core assessment dimensions.
grade.ability_contentDesc: Task response, ideas, examples, and development of content.
grade.ability_languageDesc: Vocabulary, sentence patterns, grammar control, and accuracy of expression.
grade.ability_organizationDesc: Paragraphing, cohesion, argument sequence, and overall structure.
grade.processedInSegments: This long essay was graded in sections and synthesised into one report for fuller Content, Language, and Organization feedback.
grade.singlePassReviewed: The full essay was reviewed as one complete piece, with ability distribution data generated alongside the feedback.

analytics.title: Analytics Dashboard
analytics.subtitle: Track class performance trends, common mistakes, and score distribution across all graded essays.
analytics.noData: No graded essays yet. Start grading to see analytics.
analytics.classDashboardSubtitle: Automatically summarizes shared grammar issues, vocabulary richness, and predicted DSE level distribution from graded essays for panel-head reporting.
analytics.noMistakesData: Not enough feedback data to analyze mistakes.
analytics.noFilterResults: No essays match the current filters.
analytics.fixedDesc: Set fixed score ranges for each grade. Students are graded based on their absolute score.
analytics.curveDesc: Assign grades based on class ranking. Top students get higher grades regardless of absolute score.
analytics.resourceEmpty: Select essays with feedback data, then generate a teaching resource based on common errors.
analytics.editingHint: Edit the generated resource below. Changes are reflected in the preview and PDF export.

batch.title: Batch Grading
batch.subtitle: Upload multiple essays and grade them all at once with a shared rubric.
batch.onePerFile: Each file = one essay. Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT, images, ZIP, and 7z archives.
batch.quotaWarning: Only {{count}} of {{total}} essays will be graded (monthly limit).
batch.mergeHint: Tick all files that belong to the same essay (e.g. multi-page scans), then click Merge. Files are joined in filename order.
batch.selectAtLeastTwo: Select at least 2 files to merge.
batch.splitConfirm: Split back into original files? This will discard the merged grading result.

roster.title: Class Roster
roster.subtitle: Manage your classes and student lists. Student names will auto-match with uploaded files during batch grading.
roster.noClasses: No classes yet. Create one to start building your roster.
roster.bulkPlaceholder: Paste student names (one per line, or comma-separated)
roster.bulkHint: Press Shift+Enter to add all students
